title: Closets 2.0 & Modern UI Dialogs
summary: DM rooms now show friendly names instead of raw IDs, a full nickname system for Closets, isolated per-pair message storage, and all native browser dialogs replaced with beautiful custom modals.

changes.title: DM Friendly Names
changes.description: Closet (DM) rooms now display the partner's @username in the chat header instead of the raw internal ID like #closet--u_xxx--u_yyy.

changes.title: Nickname System for Closets
changes.description: You can now set a personal nickname for any DM contact. Tap the ✏️ button next to their name in the header, or use the ⋮ menu in the Closets profile tab. Nicknames are saved to your account and sync across sessions.

changes.title: Closets Tab Rebuilt
changes.description: The Closets tab in your profile now shows a clean card per contact with avatar, display name (nickname or @handle), last activity, and a ⋮ menu for: Open Closet, Edit Nickname, and Remove from List.

changes.title: Quick Enable for Disabled Links
changes.description: Disabled shared links now show an inline ✅ Enable button directly on the row — no need to open the 3-dots menu just to re‑enable a link.

changes.title: Isolated DM Message Storage
changes.description: Each Closet conversation now uses a dedicated storage path (dm-{targetUid}/conv-{pairId}) in the repo. UserA and UserC both chatting with UserB each have completely separate message histories — even if they share a room name — so no messages bleed between conversations.

changes.title: Cleaner DM Room Experience
changes.description: When inside a Closet: the Share, Roommates, and Settings buttons are hidden; no 'X joined' system message is injected; and the DM is not recorded in your rooms-joined list — only in dms.json.

changes.title: Backward Compatibility for Old Closets
changes.description: Existing closet-- style DM keys from previous versions continue to work. The new dm-/conv- format applies only to newly opened Closets.

changes.title: Replaced All Native Browser Dialogs
changes.description: Every alert(), confirm(), and prompt() call has been removed and replaced with a custom modal system (uiAlert / uiConfirm / uiPrompt) with smooth animations, dark-mode aware styling, keyboard support (Enter / Escape), and danger-mode red buttons for destructive actions.

changes.title: DM Rooms Excluded from Rooms Tab
changes.description: The Rooms tab in your profile no longer shows DM conversation keys, keeping it clean with only actual group rooms.
